data.content:
source5
Data source source5

source5.Consumer_Profiles
The Consumer_Profiles.csv table contains personal and financial details of consumers, including unique AgencyID, names, net worth, employer, number of credit cards, marital status, gender, phone number, number of children, age, address, country, number of cars, middle initial, and postal code. Numeric fields are stored as strings or floats.

source6
Data source source6

source6.Marketing_Leads
The Marketing_Leads.csv table contains marketing prospects with identifiers, personal details, financial metrics, and contact information. Columns include unique codes, names, network worth, employer, credit card count, address lines, marital status, gender, phone numbers, children count, age, city, country, courses, state, income, credit rating, and rental flag.
